name: Eagle Limousine & Travel Inc
recent_news: No M&A or operational news found; Nasser Ragab also associated with 'US Eagle Limo LLC' per LinkedIn (year unknown). Likely related to / overlapping with American Eagle Limousine & Travel Service in Lorton, VA, which is a luxury/event limo operator, not a school-bus contractor.
fit_notes: Not a fit. ~4 employees, PO Box address, limousine/car-service business with no evidence of school district routes, yellow buses, SPED contracts, or a fleet relevant to Summit. Even the larger affiliated American Eagle Limo is a wedding/event luxury operator, not student transportation.

name: Embassador Limousine
recent_news: No company web presence, no news, no FMCSA passenger carrier match found under this name. Ambassador Limousine in Charlottesville VA is a separate, unrelated family-owned operator (owner Tony Dagner).
fit_notes: Not a fit. Micro-operator (PO Box, 4 employees) with no discoverable website, no school district customers, and no evidence of operating school buses or SPED routes. Below Summit tuck-in threshold and wrong service line.

name: Reston Limo Connection Inc
recent_news: No company-specific news. NOT to be confused with Reston Limousine & Travel Service (Kristina Bouweiri, 250+ vehicles, woman-owned, est. 1990) headquartered in Sterling/Dulles corridor; that is a different, much larger company.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Tiny PO Box car-service operator with 4 employees and no school transportation footprint. Distinct from the well-known Reston Limousine; this entity has effectively zero discoverable web/business presence.

name: Blue Star Express Inc
recent_news: FMCSA SAFER snapshot lists Blue Star Express Inc (USDOT 2295910) at the Plainfield, NJ address. LeadIQ profiles the company as a truck transportation business with ~$808K 2025 revenue. No evidence of school-bus or student/SPED operations.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Appears to be a freight/trucking carrier rather than a passenger or student-transportation operator. Wrong industry for a Summit School Services tuck-in; likely a false positive in the special_needs flag.

name: Exclusive Limousine Svc
recent_news: No company web presence or news located. Address (2500 N Taylor Rd) is in Cleveland Heights, OH. No FMCSA, BBB, or school-district vendor listings found tying this entity to student transportation.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Micro single-operator limo service with no online footprint, no school district customer evidence, no school-bus fleet. Below Summit tuck-in size threshold and wrong service line.
